elements.text: Ticket created in Zendesk • HubSpot updated • SLA: 2 hours

parameters.subject: We received your support request — Ticket #{{ $json.externalId }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for reaching out! We've received your request and our team will get back to you shortly.

Reference: {{ $json.externalId }}

Subject: {{ $json.subject }}

Expected response: {{ $json.tier === 'paid' ? 'Within 2 hours (priority support)' : 'Within 24 hours' }}

In the meantime, check our Help Center for instant answers.

Best,
The Support Team

meta.description: Single webhook accepts support requests from Intercom, Zendesk, Slack, email form, or custom web form. Normalizes payload, routes paid users to Zendesk priority queue + HubSpot update + VIP Slack channel; free users to standard Zendesk queue. Sends confirmation email to both tiers.
prerequisites: Slack Bot Token with chat:write scope
Configure your support channels (Intercom, Zendesk, etc.) to POST to the n8n webhook URL
Update Slack channel IDs (VIP support vs general support)
Verify Zendesk custom field IDs or remove custom_fields block

edge_cases: Intercom webhook format → test with Intercom dev tools
Missing email → Gmail node fails, add IF check
Zendesk requester already exists → creates duplicate, add upsert logic
Slack slash command format differs from app mention format
